27 class IXMUidToLidMng
28 {
29 public:
30 
32  IXMUidToLidMng(Arcane::IMesh* mesh, ArcGeoSim::ParallelUtils& parallel_utils, const bool use_memory, Arcane::ITraceMng* trace_mng);
33 
35  virtual ~IXMUidToLidMng()
36  {
37  if (m_face_aid_mapper) delete m_face_aid_mapper;
38  if (m_edge_aid_mapper) delete m_edge_aid_mapper;
39  if (m_connection_aid_mapper) delete m_connection_aid_mapper;
40  if (m_particle_aid_mapper) delete m_particle_aid_mapper;
41  }
42 
43 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
44  void setGraph(Arcane::IGraph2* graph);
45 #endif
46 
47 public:
48  Int64 getFaceAidMax() const {
49  if(m_face_aid_mapper)
50  return m_face_aid_mapper->getItemAidMax() ;
51  else
52  return -1 ;
53  }
54 
55  Int64 getLinkAidMax() const {
56  if(m_connection_aid_mapper)
57  return m_connection_aid_mapper->getItemAidMax() ;
58  else
59  return -1 ;
60  }
61 
62  Int64 getParticleAidMax() const {
63  if(m_particle_aid_mapper)
64  return m_particle_aid_mapper->getItemAidMax() ;
65  else
66  return -1 ;
67  }
68 
74  void loadFaceAidMapping(const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMFaceData& face_data, const bool do_check, const bool is_parallel=true); // build aid->lid mapping (with data from last load, or from all previous load if use_memory was set true)
75  void loadEdgeAidMapping(const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMEdgeData& edge_data, const bool do_check, const bool is_parallel=true);
76  void loadConnectionAidMapping(const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMConnectionData& connection_data, const bool do_check, const bool is_parallel=true);
77  void endUsingAidMapping(); // clear aid->lid mapping
78

84 
89  void localItemsUniqueIdToLocalId(Arcane::Int32SharedArray& local_item_lids,
90  Arcane::Int64SharedArray& local_item_uids,
91  Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView all_item_uids,
92  const Arcane::eItemKind item_kind,
93  const bool do_fatal=false) const;
94 
95 private:
96  Arcane::IMesh* m_mesh = nullptr;
97 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
98  Arcane::IGraph2* m_graph = nullptr ;
99 #endif
100  ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper* m_face_aid_mapper = nullptr;
101  ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper* m_edge_aid_mapper = nullptr;
102  ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper* m_connection_aid_mapper = nullptr;
103  ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper* m_particle_aid_mapper = nullptr;
104  bool m_use_memory;
105 
106  void _lidToUid(Arcane::Int64Array& uids,Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView lids,const Arcane::eItemKind& item_kind) const;
107  Arcane::VariableArrayInt64 * _ItemAidMemoryVariable(const bool use_memory, const Arcane::eItemKind item_kind) const;

110  Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView items_connectivity,
111  Arcane::Int32ArrayView local_ids,
112  bool allow_null);
